nasb.text: “And I will send fire upon Magog and those who inhabit the coastlands in safety; and they will know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: I will send fire on Magog and on those who dwell securely in the coastlands, and they shall know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必降火在瑪各和安居在沿海地帶的人身上，他們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要火烧安居在玛各和海岛的人，他们就知道我是耶和华。
